title: More Structure Processors
description: Adds More Structure processor types for Developers to use in Mods or in Datapacks if using datapack on a modloader
body: This mod adds many new Structure Processor Types that allow developers of mods and datapacks to have much more options when using processors to allow for more customization.  One major feature is doing compatibility with other mods using some of the processors allowing players to have the mod or to not have the mod but if they do you can change some blocks in the structure from the other mod and if they don't have it, it just stays the same.  Along with a custom Place above and Below processor to allow devs to say put certain plants above a certain block randomly.  Along with some other QOL processors like Directional Processors that put the block in the same direction as a previous block which is useful for something like randomly replacing furnaces with Blast Furnaces or Smokers.
